myopia.title: Impact of exercise on myopia in children and adolescents and its modifying factors: a systematic review and meta-analysis.

myopia.title: Temporal trends in refractive error among children and adolescents in Germany - a large-scale analysis of spectacle sales data from dispensing opticians from 2001 to 2025.

myopia.title: Two-Year Changes in Astigmatism in Myopic Children Wearing Lenslet-ARray-Integrated Spectacle Lenses.
myopia.summary: Wearing LARI lenses for 2 years did not seem to lead to any clinically significant additional progression in refractive and corneal astigmatism.

myopia.title: Effectiveness and implementation of an intervention strategy-based health promoting schools framework to reduce idiopathic scoliosis and myopia among children and adolescents in Shanghai, China: study protocol.

myopia.title: Increasing Evidence for the Utility of Red-Light Therapy and High Concentration Atropine in Myopia Control.
myopia.zh: 越來越多的證據顯示紅光療法和高濃度阿托品在控制近視方面的效用。

myopia.title: Short-term efficacy of increasing 0.01% atropine administration frequency in controlling myopia progression in adolescents.

myopia.zh_sum: 在每日一次 0.01% 阿托品治療下近視控制不佳的青少年中，將用藥頻率增加至每日兩次可能會減緩 AL 進展，且沒有明顯的安全問題，這可以作為此類患者的替代管理選擇。

contactlens.title: Genotypic diversity and molecular epidemiology of Acanthamoeba keratitis in China: Identification of novel T4 variants and source attribution.

contactlens.title: Fusarium keratitis in an older adult without exogenous or traumatic risk factors: A case report on intrinsic ocular surface predisposition.

contactlens.zh: 無外源性或創傷性危險因子的老年人鐮刀菌角膜炎：關於眼表內在傾向的病例報告。

lens.title: Neuro-Optometric Rehabilitation to Prevent Post-concussion Visual Complications: A Case Report.

lens.title: Exploring challenges and community support for hard-to-reach persons with visual impairment in the Free State province, South Africa: A qualitative study.

lens.title: Community-based interventions for non-communicable diseases in Africa: a scoping review of scope, effectiveness, and implementation factors.
lens.summary: Community-based interventions for NCDs in Africa demonstrate huge potential to counter the rising NCD burden but encounter significant challenges; successful implementation requires resource sensitive and cultural tailored strategies.

lens.title: Macular pigment optical density correlates inversely with intraretinal light scatter in support of a polarization-dependent glare-reduction mechanism.

lens.summary: Impaired binocular vision early in life from amblyopia or strabismus is related to lower scores than controls for walking on standardized tests of motor ability. …

refractive.summary: Progressive belimumab dose spacing and withdrawal, coupled with clinical monitoring, could be a practicable approach in selected patients with SLE with long-standing disease remission on minimal glucocorticoid doses, no additional immunosup …

refractive.title: Benchmarking with Patient Outcomes - Unmasked Surgeon Comparisons within a Learning Community for Continuous Improvement.
refractive.summary: Patient-reported outcome measures (PROMs) are increasingly applied in clinical practice to improve quality of care and patient outcomes. …

cataract.title: Visual Outcomes Following Cataract Surgery With Custom-Made Toric IOLs for the Correction of High Corneal Astigmatism.
cataract.summary: Customized high-cylinder toric IOLs significantly improve UDVA and reduce RA in eyes with extreme corneal astigmatism. Although slightly inferior to standard toric IOLs, they provide an effective treatment option for astigmatic correction i …
cataract.zh: 使用客製化環面人工水晶體矯正高位角膜散光的白內障手術後的視力結果。

cataract.title: Comparison of Visual Outcomes Between Bilateral Implantation of Multifocal Intraocular Lens and Mix-and-Match Strategy.
cataract.summary: The mix-and-match strategy provided comparable binocular distance visual acuity, contrast sensitivity, and subjective visual quality to bilateral multifocal IOL implantation. …

cataract.title: Effects of postoperative inflammation on visual and refractive recovery after cataract surgery: role of subconjunctival dexamethasone.
cataract.summary: Postoperative inflammation was associated with delayed visual and refractive recovery. Dex was associated with less postoperative inflammation and earlier recovery within the first month.
cataract.zh: 術後發炎對白內障術後視力和屈光恢復的影響：結膜下地塞米鬆的作用。
cataract.zh_sum: 術後發炎與視力和屈光恢復延遲有關。 Dex 與術後發炎較少和第一個月內較早恢復有關。

cataract.title: Expanding visual horizons: comparative outcomes of bilateral implantation of an extended depth-of-focus versus enhanced and standard monofocal intraocular lenses.
cataract.summary: In this retrospective comparative case series, bilateral implantation of the Asqelio EDOF IOL was associated with better intermediate visual acuity and modestly better near visual acuity than implantation of the enhanced and standard monofo …
cataract.zh: 擴大視野：雙側植入物擴展焦深與增強型和標準單焦點人工水晶體的結果比較。
cataract.zh_sum: 在這個回顧性比較病例係列中，與增強型和標準單焦點植入相比，雙側植入 Asqelio EDOF IOL 與更好的中間視力和稍微更好的近距離視力有關…

cataract.title: Potential risk of capsular tension ring implantation combined with phacoemulsification in high myopia patients by increasing central macular thickness and intraocular lens tilt: a retrospective comparative study with 1-week, 1-month, and 3-month outcomes.
cataract.summary: CTR implantation during phacoemulsification poses a potential risk in high myopia patients, particularly those with axial lengths between 26 mm and 30 mm, by increasing both CMT and IOL tilt.
cataract.zh: 高度近視患者晶狀體囊張力環植入合併超音波乳化術增加黃斑中心厚度和人工水晶體傾斜的潛在風險：1週、1個月和3個月結果的回顧性比較研究。
cataract.zh_sum: 超音波乳化手術期間的 CTR 植入會增加 CMT 和 IOL 傾斜，從而對高度近視患者（尤其是眼軸長度在 26 毫米至 30 毫米之間的患者）構成潛在風險。

cataract.title: Early Postoperative Outcomes of Phacoemulsification With Concurrent Silicone Oil Removal in a Tertiary Eye Care Hospital of Bangladesh.
cataract.summary: Phacoemulsification with concurrent SOR is a useful method that is associated with acceptable visual and anatomical outcomes, and it eliminates the burden for another surgery for cataract extraction.
cataract.zh: 孟加拉三級眼科醫院超音波乳化聯合矽油去除術的早期術後結果。
cataract.zh_sum: 併發 SOR 的超音波乳化術是一種有用的方法，與可接受的視覺和解剖結果相關，並且它消除了另一次白內障摘除手術的負擔。

cataract.title: Intraocular Lens Positional Instability and Refractive Prediction Error after Cataract Surgery in Eyes with Retinitis Pigmentosa: A Comparative Study.
cataract.summary: RP eyes showed greater postoperative IOL positional instability and refractive unpredictability. The positional differences could not be attributed specifically to RP because of imbalances in postoperative timing and IOL design, whereas ref …
cataract.zh: 色素性視網膜炎白內障手術後人工水晶體位置不穩定性和屈光預測誤差：一項比較研究。
cataract.zh_sum: RP 眼術後 IOL 位置不穩定性和屈光不可預測性較大。由於術後時機和 IOL 設計的不平衡，位置差異不能具體歸因於 RP，而參考…

cataract.title: Clinical Outcomes After Bilateral Mix-and-match Implantation of Extended Depth of Focus and Trifocal Intraocular Lenses.
cataract.summary: Bilateral Mix-and-match Implantation of EDOF and Trifocal IOL implantation showed good visual outcomes for distance, intermediate, and near vision until 12 months. …
cataract.zh: 雙側混合搭配植入擴展焦深和三焦點人工水晶體後的臨床結果。
cataract.zh_sum: 雙側混合搭配 EDOF 植入和三焦點 IOL 植入在 12 個月前顯示出良好的遠端視力、中視力和近距離視力視力結果。 ……

glaucoma.title: Long-term Outcomes of the Flanged Scleral Fixation Technique.
glaucoma.summary: Flanged scleral fixation showed acceptable long-term anatomical and visual outcomes in this complex cohort. These findings should be interpreted cautiously given the lack of endothelial cell data and the observed postoperative intraocular p …
glaucoma.zh: 凸緣鞏膜固定技術的長期結果。
glaucoma.zh_sum: 在這個複雜的隊列中，凸緣鞏膜固定顯示出可接受的長期解剖和視覺結果。鑑於缺乏內皮細胞數據和觀察到的術後眼內 p …

glaucoma.title: Medications and Supplements Associated With Drug-Induced Glaucoma.
glaucoma.summary: Glaucoma is a common condition that damages the optic nerve, usually as a result of an increase in intraocular pressure (IOP). It can be divided into two types: open-angle glaucoma (OAG) and acute angle-closure glaucoma (AACG). …
glaucoma.zh: 與藥物引起的青光眼相關的藥物和補充劑。
glaucoma.zh_sum: 青光眼是一種損害視神經的常見疾病，通常是由於眼壓 (IOP) 升高造成的。它可分為兩種類型：開角型青光眼（OAG）和急性閉角型青光眼（AACG）。 ……

glaucoma.title: Microglia suppress Müller cell FGF1 and contribute to retinal ganglion cell degeneration in glaucoma.
glaucoma.summary: Glaucoma is a progressive neurodegenerative disease characterized by retinal ganglion cell (RGC) loss, in which glial activation and neuroinflammation contribute importantly to disease progression. …
glaucoma.zh: 小膠質細胞抑制穆勒細胞 FGF1 並導致青光眼中視網膜神經節細胞變性。
glaucoma.zh_sum: 青光眼是一種進行性神經退化性疾病，其特徵是視網膜神經節細胞（RGC）損失，其中膠質細胞活化和神經發炎對疾病進展有重要影響。 ……

glaucoma.title: Nicotinamide Supplementation and Primary Open-Angle Glaucoma in Patients With Ocular Hypertension.
glaucoma.summary: In this cohort study, systemic nicotinamide exposure was associated with a reduced risk of disease development in patients with OHT. …
glaucoma.zh: 高眼壓患者補充菸鹼醯胺和原發性開角型青光眼。
glaucoma.zh_sum: 在這項隊列研究中，全身菸鹼醯胺暴露與 OHT 患者疾病發生風險降低有關。 ……

glaucoma.title: Relationship between albuminuria and primary open angle glaucoma in patients attending a Nigerian tertiary hospital.
glaucoma.summary: This study demonstrated a significant association between POAG and albuminuria, with increasing severity of POAG correlating with higher odds of albuminuria. …
glaucoma.zh: 尼日利亞三級醫院患者白蛋白尿與原發性開角型青光眼的關係。
glaucoma.zh_sum: 這項研究證明了 POAG 和蛋白尿之間存在顯著關聯，POAG 嚴重程度的增加與蛋白尿幾率的增加有關。 ……

glaucoma.title: Pascal selective laser trabeculoplasty (PSLT) in the treatment of ocular hypertension and open-angle glaucoma compared to travoprost eye drops: A non-inferiority clinical trial.
glaucoma.summary: PSLT was as effective as prostaglandin eye drops in reducing IOP and IOP peak in POAG and OHT patients. These findings are especially important as interest grows in minimally invasive glaucoma treatments and reducing reliance on topical med …
glaucoma.zh: 與曲伏前列腺素眼藥水相比，帕斯卡選擇性雷射小梁成形術（PSLT）治療高眼壓和開角型青光眼：一項非劣效性臨床試驗。
glaucoma.zh_sum: PSLT 在降低 POAG 和 OHT 患者的 IOP 和 IOP 峰值方面與前列腺素眼藥水一樣有效。隨著人們對微創青光眼治療和減少對局部藥物的依賴越來越感興趣，這些發現尤其重要…

glaucoma.title: Exchange of Ahmed glaucoma valve for a Paul glaucoma implant and management of postoperative hypotony: a case report.
glaucoma.summary: Same-quadrant exchange with PGI may be viable after failed GDD surgery. Eyes with uveitis may have a higher risk of hypotony, especially after ripcord removal. …
glaucoma.zh: 艾哈邁德青光眼瓣膜更換為保羅青光眼植入物和術後低眼壓的治療：病例報告。
glaucoma.zh_sum: GDD 手術失敗後，與 PGI 進行同像限交換可能是可行的。患有葡萄膜炎的眼睛可能有更高的眼壓過低風險，尤其是在拆除拉繩後。 ……

glaucoma.title: Impact of Chemotherapy and Radiotherapy on Iris Metastases: A Case Report.
glaucoma.summary: Our case offers a unique visual insight into the impact of both systemic chemotherapy and localised radiotherapy on uncommon iris metastases, with sequential images taken at each stage of treatment. …
glaucoma.zh: 化療和放療對虹膜轉移的影響：病例報告。
glaucoma.zh_sum: 我們的案例提供了獨特的視覺洞察，了解全身化療和局部放射治療對罕見虹膜轉移的影響，並在治療的每個階段拍攝連續影像。 ……

retina.title: Aflibercept with and without laser therapy in diabetic macular edema: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
retina.summary: The adjunctive use of laser therapy with aflibercept in DME does not provide statistically significant improvement in visual or anatomical outcomes over aflibercept alone.
retina.zh: 阿柏西普合併或不合併雷射治療糖尿病黃斑水腫：系統性回顧與統合分析。
retina.zh_sum: 與單獨使用阿柏西普相比，在 DME 中輔助使用雷射療法與阿柏西普在視覺或解剖學結果方面並未提供統計學上顯著的改善。

retina.title: Effectiveness and safety of intravitreal faricimab for macular oedema secondary to retinal vein occlusion: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
retina.summary: The synthesis is consistent with intravitreal faricimab use being associated with visual and anatomical improvement in macular oedema secondary to retinal vein occlusion, with the treatment-naïve pooled estimate primarily reflecting registr …
retina.zh: 玻璃體內注射法里西單抗治療視網膜靜脈阻塞繼發性黃斑水腫的有效性和安全性：系統性回顧和統合分析。
retina.zh_sum: 此合成結果與玻璃體內使用 Faricimab 與視網膜靜脈阻塞繼發的黃斑水腫的視覺和解剖學改善相關，而未經治療的匯總估計主要反映了登記…

retina.title: Comparison of intravitreal anti-VEGF treatment burden in different retinal diseases.
retina.summary: Although the overall perceived burden of anti-VEGF treatment was similar across retinal diseases, patients' specific concerns varied. …
retina.zh: 不同視網膜疾病玻璃體內抗VEGF治療負擔的比較。
retina.zh_sum: 儘管不同視網膜疾病的抗 VEGF 治療的整體感知負擔相似，但患者的具體關注點有所不同。 ……

retina.title: Treatment effects prediction and clinical decision-making system for retinal vein occlusion by artificial intelligence.
retina.summary: Retinal vein occlusion (RVO) is a chronic retinal vascular disease that often requires repeated anti-VEGF injections and long-term follow-up. …
retina.zh: 人工智慧視網膜靜脈阻塞治療效果預測及臨床決策系統
retina.zh_sum: 視網膜靜脈阻塞（RVO）是一種慢性視網膜血管疾病，通常需要反覆注射抗VEGF藥物並長期追蹤。 ……

retina.title: Machine Learning to Predict Outcomes of Anti-VEGF Therapy in Neovascular Age-Related Macular Degeneration.
retina.summary: Machine learning models based on automated fluid metrics can accurately predict treatment burden and VA outcomes within the clinical environment in which they are developed. …
retina.zh: 機器學習預測新生血管性老年黃斑部病變的抗 VEGF 治療結果。
retina.zh_sum: 基於自動化液體指標的機器學習模型可以在其開發的臨床環境中準確預測治療負擔和 VA 結果。 ……

retina.title: Baseline Optical Coherence Tomography Biomarkers Associated with the 2-Year Development of Macular Atrophy or Fibrosis in Neovascular Age-related Macular Degeneration.
retina.summary: Baseline OCT biomarkers, particularly IRF and type 3 MNV, strongly predict macular atrophy, while type 2 MNV predicts fibrosis in eyes with exudative neovascular AMD treated with a T&E regimen. …
retina.zh: 与新生血管性年龄相关性黄斑变性中黄斑萎缩或纤维化的 2 年发展相关的基线光学相干断层扫描生物标志物。
retina.zh_sum: 基线 OCT 生物标志物，特别是 IRF 和 3 型 MNV，强烈预测黄斑萎缩，而 2 型 MNV 则预测接受 T&E 方案治疗的渗出性新生血管性 AMD 的眼睛纤维化。 ……

retina.title: Phenotype-driven management of diabetic macular edema: multimodal imaging biomarkers and individualized therapy.
retina.summary: Diabetic macular edema (DME) remains a leading cause of vision impairment worldwide. Although intravitreal anti-vascular endothelial growth factor (anti-VEGF) agents are widely regarded as first-line treatment, a substantial proportion of p …
retina.zh: 表型驅動的糖尿病黃斑水腫管理：多模式影像生物標記和個人化治療。
retina.zh_sum: 糖尿病黃斑水腫 (DME) 仍然是全世界視力損害的主要原因。儘管玻璃體內注射抗血管內皮生長因子（抗 VEGF）藥物被廣泛認為是一線治療，但相當大比例的患者…

retina.title: Real-Life 1-Year Results and Predictors of Visual Outcome with Intravitreal Faricimab for Treatment of Exudative Neovascular Age-Related Macular Degeneration.
retina.summary: In our real-world practice, faricimab effectively controls nAMD, offering significant anatomical benefits and visual stability with extended dosing intervals. Approximately 80% of treatment-naïve patients maintained ≥ Q12-week schedules. …
retina.zh: 玻璃體內注射 Faricimab 治療滲出性新生血管性老年黃斑部病變的真實一年結果和視力結果預測因素。
retina.zh_sum: 在我們的實際實踐中，faricimab 可有效控制 nAMD，透過延長給藥間隔提供顯著的解剖學益處和視覺穩定性。約 80% 的初治患者維持 ≥Q12 週的治療方案。 ……

dryeye.title: The Science and Clinical Evolution of Corneal Cross-Linking: Mechanism of Action, Ultra-Structural Changes, Clinical Indications, and Emerging Treatment Strategies.
dryeye.summary: Keratoconus is the most common corneal ectatic disorder worldwide. Typically manifesting in adolescence, it imposes a substantial burden on quality of life and, if untreated, may progress to advanced stages requiring corneal transplantation …
dryeye.zh: 角膜交聯的科學和臨床進展：作用機制、超結構變化、臨床適應症和新興治療策略。
dryeye.zh_sum: 圓錐角膜是全世界最常見的角膜擴張性疾病。通常出現在青春期，它會給生活品質帶來沉重負擔，如果不及時治療，可能會進展到需要角膜移植的晚期階段…

dryeye.title: Beyond migraine: A narrative review of photophobia's clinical spectrum.
dryeye.summary: Photophobia is frequently reported in migraine and traumatic brain injury, as well as in common ocular conditions such as dry eye disease and corneal pathology. …
dryeye.zh: 超越偏頭痛：畏光症臨床光譜的敘述性回顧。
dryeye.zh_sum: 畏光常見於偏頭痛和創傷性腦損傷，以及乾眼症和角膜病理等常見眼部疾病。 ……

dryeye.title: Ocular Symptoms After Refractive Surgery.
dryeye.summary: In this cohort study, postoperative ocular symptom trajectories after refractive surgery followed distinct longitudinal patterns, suggesting these trajectories may have been associated with specific baseline factors. …
dryeye.zh: 屈光手術後的眼部症狀。
dryeye.zh_sum: 在這項隊列研究中，屈光手術後的術後眼部症狀軌跡遵循不同的縱向模式，表明這些軌跡可能與特定的基線因素相關。 ……

dryeye.title: Evaluation of the skin carcinogenicity of the TRPV1 antagonist motugivatrep (SJP-0132) using an ultra-short-term two-stage skin carcinogenesis assay in Tg-rasH2 mice.
dryeye.summary: Motugivatrep (SJP-0132), a transient receptor potential cation channel subfamily V member 1 (TRPV1) antagonist, is being developed as an ophthalmic drug for dry eye disease. …
dryeye.zh: 使用 Tg-rasH2 小鼠超短期兩階段皮膚致癌試驗評估 TRPV1 拮抗劑 motugivatrep (SJP-0132) 的皮膚致癌性。
dryeye.zh_sum: Motugivatrep (SJP-0132) 是一種瞬時受體電位陽離子通道亞家族 V 成員 1 (TRPV1) 拮抗劑，正在開發為治療乾眼症的眼科藥物。 ……

dryeye.title: Clinical and Immunological Effects of Systemic Vitamin D Supplementation in Vitamin D-Deficient Dry Eye Disease: A Prospective Comparative Study.
dryeye.summary: In vitamin D-deficient DED, systemic vitamin D supplementation added to topical therapy was associated with greater improvement in tear film parameters and modulation of selected inflammatory cytokines compared with topical therapy alone. …
dryeye.zh: 全身性補充維生素 D 對維生素 D 缺乏性乾眼症的臨床和免疫學影響：一項前瞻性比較研究。
dryeye.zh_sum: 在維生素 D 缺乏的 DED 中，與單獨局部治療相比，在局部治療的基礎上補充全身維生素 D 與淚膜參數和選定炎症細胞因子的調節有更大的改善相關。 ……

dryeye.title: Belantamab mafodotin, a BCMA-directed antibody-drug conjugate for multiple myeloma.
dryeye.summary: Belantamab mafodotin-blmf (bela-maf) is a first-in-class antibody-drug conjugate (ADC) that targets B-cell maturation antigen (BCMA) for the treatment of multiple myeloma. …
dryeye.zh: Belantamab mafodotin，一種針對多發性骨髓瘤的 BCMA 導引抗體藥物偶聯物。
dryeye.zh_sum: Belantamab mafodotin-blmf (bela-maf) 是一種一流的抗體藥物偶聯物 (ADC)，可針對 B 細胞成熟抗原 (BCMA)，用於治療多發性骨髓瘤。 ……

dryeye.title: Which features best differentiate Sjögren's-related from non-Sjögren's-related dry eye disease?
dryeye.summary: SjD-related DED is characterized by ocular surface inflammation, symptom-sign discordance with signs outweighing symptoms, and a Schirmer test < 5 mm/5 min.
dryeye.zh: 哪些特徵可以最好地區分乾燥相關乾眼症和非乾燥相關乾眼症？
dryeye.zh_sum: SjD 相關 DED 的特徵是眼表發炎、症狀徵像不一致（體徵大於症狀）以及 Schirmer 試驗 < 5 mm/5 分鐘。

dryeye.title: Randomized comparison of lipid-containing and non-lipid-containing artificial tears on tear film dynamics over a 3-month period.
dryeye.summary: Patients with lipid deficiency may benefit from lipid-containing AT over the non-lipid-containing AT to stabilize tear lipid thickness and minimize tear thinning while increasing tear breakup time.
dryeye.zh: 三個月內含脂和不含脂人工淚液對淚膜動態的隨機比較。
dryeye.zh_sum: 與不含脂質的 AT 相比，脂質缺乏的患者可能受益於含脂質 AT，以穩定淚液脂質厚度並最大程度地減少淚液變薄，同時增加淚液破裂時間。
